title: Animated Miku Totem!
description: Adds a cute animated totem in the form of Miku!
body:
I think she looks really cute (*≧ω≦*)! She can blink and look around, and she'll just be your faithful friend! Works great with Optifine and CIT Resewn, and should work great with Vanilla as well.

P.S: But only when you have a totem, of course😅
